summary: Iteration 27 — Phase D (auto-punch geofence) + Bank Details in KYC verified. Backend: 12/12 pytest PASS covering KYC bank fields (GET null baseline, PATCH happy path — spaces stripped, IFSC uppercased, valid empty-clears), validation 400s (short account, bad IFSC), AttendancePunch source default=manual and explicit geofence-auto, geofence radius still enforced (400 outside), and _enrich_user_with_company nesting on /auth/me. Frontend: /kyc renders the fourth 'Bank details' card with all four required testIDs (kyc-bank-name, kyc-bank-acc digits-only, kyc-ifsc uppercased+11-char cap, kyc-name-bank); values persist across reload (verified via API + reload GET). Profile shows a new 'Attendance' section with row-auto-punch + auto-punch-switch for employees ONLY; toggle click does not crash. Regression: /(tabs)/profile, /(tabs)/attendance, /(tabs)/documents, /kyc, /history, and landing all render with zero red errors and zero 'Maximum update depth' warnings under a valid session. Sign out from Phase A still clicks cleanly and clears the token. NOTE: on web preview Alert.alert used by kyc-save does NOT resolve the 'Save' button choice — the persistence path itself is fine (verified via direct PATCH + reload) but automated web tap-through of the confirm-dialog is not possible. Background geofence auto-punch cannot be validated on web preview (out-of-scope, needs native build + physical device + Always-allow location).

ui_bugs.issue: Review request specified the 'Attendance' section should appear ABOVE 'Security', but the current implementation renders it BELOW Security. Observed Y-offsets: Security y=858, Attendance y=998. Confirmed at /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx L211 (Security) then L248 (Attendance). Functionally correct (employee-only, row-auto-punch + switch visible) but ordering diverges from spec.

askConfirmSave uses Alert.alert with a 'Save' button whose onPress fires the actual PATCH. On react-native-web Alert.alert renders as window.alert() and never dispatches the button.onPress — so tapping kyc-save on the web preview cannot complete a save. Native (iOS/Android) build is unaffected. Consider Platform.OS==='web' ? window.confirm(...) branch, or a custom Modal. Reference /app/frontend/app/kyc.tsx L123-131.

react_native_issues.issue: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated on RN Web. Use 'boxShadow'. Multiple warnings on every screen load.

action_items: Re-order Profile sections so 'Attendance' renders ABOVE 'Security' as per review spec (swap the two JSX blocks in /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx around L211-290).

Replace Alert.alert save-confirmation in /app/frontend/app/kyc.tsx with a web-friendly dialog (Platform.OS==='web' branch using window.confirm, or a Modal) so the confirm→save chain works on web preview and remains testable.
Address deprecated RN Web props: sweep for 'shadow*' style props (use boxShadow) and props.pointerEvents (use style.pointerEvents) — appear on every screen.
Real geofence background/locked-screen behaviour, geofencing task, iOS Always-Allow flow REQUIRE a native/published build with a physical device — out-of-scope on-device manual test.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py Attendance model 'biometric_method' remains Literal['fingerprint','face'] — auto-punch from the background TaskManager posts source='geofence-auto' but must still pass a valid biometric_method literal. Confirm the frontend AutoPunchContext supplies e.g. 'fingerprint' fallback so a real geofence auto-punch doesn't 422 on submission.

kyc.tsx bank_account_number input has maxLength=20 but backend accepts 6..20 digits — matches. Ensure the visible 'Bank account number must be 6–20 digits.' error is surfaced under kyc-error banner (currently there is no min-length UI hint before Save).

success_rate.frontend: 90% — 4 of 5 required flows pass; kyc-save confirm not automatable on web

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral: 1 company (IT27FE8180 FeCo, cmp_93eee88eb9) + 1 employee (+919770024844, user_963bc90a993b) + sessions + a couple of attendance records. All cleaned up post-test. Super_admin (sksharmaconsultancy@gmail.com) NOT touched — pin_hash and pin_must_change intact.
context_for_next_testing_agent: For any /(tabs)/* live UI test the seeded session token MUST be valid; a prior Sign-out (POST /api/auth/logout) invalidates it — always re-issue via /auth/pin-login after signout, otherwise React enters a 401-retry render loop that looks like 'Maximum update depth exceeded'. Use pin-login credentials {phone, pin} rather than OTP for stable seeding. For confirming kyc-save flow on web, either patch via API directly then reload the /kyc route to observe persistence, or wait for main agent's web-friendly confirm.
rca_of_issue: Not a product bug — during initial exploration the automated test clicked Sign out which invalidated the session token. Subsequent goto /(tabs)/* with the dead token entered a rapid /auth/me → 401 → setState → re-render → /auth/me loop, saturating the JS thread and preventing the page from becoming interactive (misdiagnosed as 'Maximum update depth exceeded' from a real infinite render). Root cause = stale token in localStorage after logout. Reissuing pin-login and using the fresh token restored all navigations. Product code has no infinite-render bug in Phase D.
